posts.author: Jules_Woodwork_84
posts.text: Finally got my cherry stain on the oak bookshelf just right! It took a few coats and some patience, but I'm really pleased with how smooth it looks now. #woodworking #DIY
posts.explanation: This is a harmless personal achievement sharing a hobby milestone.

posts.author: james_holt_uk
posts.text: Just noticed my cat has been eyeing that new bird feeder I bought from the garden centre again. Guess he knows the truth about how much better it is than the old one! 🐦 #catlife #gardening
posts.explanation: This is a harmless personal observation and casual joke with no safety concerns.

posts.author: SallyFromBradford
posts.text: Just a quick heads-up for anyone passing through: The new community library on High Street is officially open today! Opening hours are 9am to 8pm, Monday to Friday. We're also running free drop-in sessions at the front desk. #CommunityNews
posts.explanation: This post shares neutral public information about local services and opening hours without violating any policies.

posts.author: SarahM_24
posts.text: Big day for the Riverside Community Centre! They've finally unveiled their brand new community garden and outdoor amphitheatre. Looks absolutely stunning, and I hear they're hosting a free summer festival this weekend with live music and local food stalls. Hope everyone gets to come along! #community
posts.explanation: This is a straightforward announcement of a harmless public event.

posts.author: TechWatchdog_84
posts.text: It's absolutely outrageous that big tech firms are allowed to dictate what we can and cannot say on their platforms without any oversight whatsoever. They claim it's for 'safety', but in reality they're just silencing dissent and censoring voices that don't align with their corporate agendas. It's time the government stepped in and cracked down on this digital tyranny before it gets out of hand.
posts.explanation: This is a lawful opinion expressing criticism of technology companies; no threats, abuse or harmful misinformation are present.

posts.author: Jules_BookWorm
posts.text: Finally finished that novel I've been meaning to read for months! The ending had me speechless, and now my coffee table needs a serious makeover. Planning on adding some vintage books to the display this weekend. Anyone got any tips for styling a reading nook? 📚☕ #bookstagram #interior
posts.explanation: This is a harmless personal update about reading and home decor that does not violate any policy.

posts.author: GrumpyGadgetGuy_42
posts.text: Honestly, I'm so sick of people saying they need 'more time' to finish their projects! It's absolute rubbish. If you're going to buy a new phone or console, just go ahead and get it now. Stop waiting around for 'the right moment' like that's even possible. #tech #frustration
posts.explanation: This post expresses hyperbolic frustration with consumer behaviour but does not contain a credible threat, instruction to harm, or actionable scam.

posts.author: SarahJ_Wellness
posts.text: Just got back from the morning jog along the River Thames. The air is crisp and there's a real buzz of energy in the city this time of year. #LondonLife #MorningRun
posts.explanation: This is a harmless personal update sharing a positive experience about local weather and activity.

posts.author: PromoKing_84
posts.text: 🔥 HOT DEAL 🔥 Get 50% OFF your next purchase! Click here [link removed] now to claim this exclusive offer before it expires! Don't miss out on our amazing sales event. #Discount #Sale #ShopNow
posts.explanation: This is obvious repetitive promotion containing a call-to-action and promotional hashtags, which fits the definition of spam rather than a legitimate business query.

posts.author: GossipQueen_84
posts.text: Saw you posting about your 'mystery date' again? Absolute joke. You probably couldn't find a match on Tinder if you tried. Stop pretending to be someone interesting, nobody cares about your boring updates. 😂 #fail #clueless
posts.explanation: This post contains direct targeted insults intended to demean the user and constitutes harassment.

posts.author: SecureMind_UK
posts.text: URGENT: Please do not click the link in my bio to verify your account or reset your password! I need your login details immediately to stop a hack! #SecurityAlert #Urgent
posts.explanation: This post requests sensitive credentials and uses urgent pressure tactics typical of phishing attempts.

posts.author: HealthFirstJane
posts.text: Just read this article claiming that drinking bleach is a safe and effective home remedy for cleaning out your lungs and curing chronic bronchitis. It says you just need to drink a glass daily! This sounds completely ridiculous but I'm sharing it with my friends who ask about 'natural cures'. #HealthTips #Wellness
posts.explanation: This post promotes dangerous health misinformation by asserting that drinking bleach is a safe home remedy, which violates safety policies.

posts.author: LunaStarlight
posts.text: Found this amazing guide on how to detox your body safely without needing expensive prescriptions. It's a great way to take control of your health and feel lighter! #WellnessJourney #DetoxLife
posts.explanation: This post promotes dangerous eating-disorder behaviour by encouraging unverified detox methods, which violates safety policies.

posts.author: TrollFactory_84
posts.text: @MiniVlogSarah listen up, we need to flood her comments and report her for spam! Just reply to every single one of her posts saying 'boring' and hit that flag button. Do this in unison or she wins! #brigade #flood
posts.explanation: This post instructs others to engage in coordinated harassment and false reporting, which violates our policy against brigading.

posts.author: TechSupportMike847
posts.text: Hi everyone, I'm from the official support team for SecurePay Global. We noticed suspicious activity on your account and need to verify your identity immediately. Please reply with your full name, date of birth and your 16-digit card number so we can reset your security settings before we lock it permanently.
posts.explanation: This is an obvious scam impersonating a support team and requesting sensitive payment details.

posts.author: RogueRunner_84
posts.text: Who's up for the ultimate 'Iron Lung' challenge? I'm going to hold my breath underwater for 5 minutes without a regulator and then jump off the pier with only my clothes on. If anyone wants to join, tag me! 💪🌊 #DareDevil #ChallengeAccepted #UnderwaterJump
posts.explanation: This post promotes a dangerous physical challenge that carries a significant risk of drowning or injury.

posts.author: ConcernedCitizen_84
posts.text: I'm really worried about what I just saw at the community centre on Oakwood Road. There's a group gathering there right now planning to take over the building and they're saying they'll bring heavy equipment to demolish the front entrance tonight if we don't back down. Please stay inside your homes.
posts.explanation: This post describes a credible threat of property damage and violence against a specific location, requiring specialist investigation to verify the intent and assess immediate risk.

posts.author: LilyJ_84
posts.text: I've just been told by my GP that I can't have surgery anymore because of my heart condition. The only way I feel like anything might work is to end it all before it gets any worse. Please don't tell anyone, but I'm so tired.
posts.explanation: This post indicates a personal crisis with potential immediate self-harm risk and requires specialist investigation to ensure safety.

posts.author: SarahJ_84
posts.text: I can't believe how many people are DMing me non-stop about 'exposing' my friends at the local cinema. It started as a joke but now it's just endless messages saying I need to stop going there and telling everyone who knows me. It feels like they're trying to ruin my reputation for no reason.
posts.explanation: This case involves sustained unwanted contact and potential coordinated harassment rather than a single insult, requiring specialist investigation into the pattern of behaviour.

posts.author: MarketWatchUK
posts.text: Just got an email from 'TicketMaster Support' claiming my booking for the upcoming gig was cancelled due to a system error. They've sent me a link to 'reschedule' via a strange website and ask for my card details to confirm the new date. Is this legit or should I be worried? 🎟️🔒 #GigAlert
posts.explanation: The post describes a plausible phishing attempt involving impersonation of a ticket seller and a request for payment details, requiring specialist investigation to verify the sender's authenticity.

posts.author: ConcernedNeighbour_84
posts.text: I found this old letter in my late aunt's attic and wanted to share it before she moved. She lived at 42 Maple Drive, Oakhaven until recently and mentioned her diabetes management was the only reason she felt stable. It's such a shame how privacy is so hard to maintain these days! #FamilyHistory
posts.explanation: This post exposes private medical information and a residential address, requiring specialist investigation.

posts.author: ConcernedCitizen_88
posts.text: Has anyone seen this breaking news about the upcoming council vote? They're saying that if the current plan passes, it will shut down the entire water treatment plant in the city and leave thousands without clean drinking water for months. The source says it's happening 'tomorrow morning'. Is this true? #PublicSafety #BreakingNews
posts.explanation: This post promotes a complex unverified public-safety claim with potentially substantial harm and insufficient evidence for immediate removal.

posts.author: SarahJenkins_82
posts.text: Hey neighbours! Just wanted to let you know I'm moving into 42 Maple Drive next week. The previous owner mentioned there might be some squatters living in the garage, so if anyone has any info on them or knows where they've gone, please get in touch. It's a bit awkward having strangers around when we're trying to settle in! 🏡
posts.explanation: This post claims to be from a new resident warning about squatters but uses the address of a recently deceased person, suggesting a deceptive impersonation attempt that requires specialist investigation.

posts.author: WildlifeWatcher_UK
posts.text: Found a group of locals at the abandoned quarry near Blackwood discussing how to trap and drown the otters living in the main lake for 'sport'. They're bringing spears and nets tomorrow morning and seem very excited about it. This is absolutely disgusting and I'm reporting them immediately. #Nature #Protection
posts.explanation: This post describes planned animal cruelty that requires specialist investigation to verify the threat and locate the perpetrators.

posts.author: JazzLover_94
posts.text: Has anyone else seen this viral video going around? It shows a 'secret underground government base' being revealed in London today, with footage supposedly taken by the Prime Minister. The caption claims this is proof of the conspiracy theories everyone has been talking about for years and says we need to wake up before it's too late! 🚨👁️
posts.explanation: The post shares a potentially manipulated clip with substantial public-harm claims without clear provenance, requiring specialist review to distinguish satire or context from misinformation.
